hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】美联储理事米歇尔·鲍曼警告不要因通胀飙升而加息；【CRYPTO】比特币延续跌势，现货 ETF 流出创历史新高，而华尔街则对人工智能大为不满；【FINANCE】伯克希尔哈撒韦公司在泰勒·莫里森交易中押注 68 亿美元的住房市场。

items.title: Fed Governor Michelle Bowman warns against hiking interest rates because of inflation spike
items.summary: Bowman said reacting to the inflation surge, driven primarily by energy prices and tariffs, has proven ineffective.
items.title_zh: 美联储理事米歇尔·鲍曼警告不要因通胀飙升而加息
items.summary_zh: 鲍曼表示，对主要由能源价格和关税推动的通胀飙升做出反应已被证明是无效的。

items.title: Bitcoin extends slide as spot ETF outflows hit a record while Wall Street rips on AI
items.summary: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs lost $2.97 billion across 10 trading days through Friday, the longest outflow streak on record. Oil's bounce on the stalled Iran deal added pressure even as global equities hit new highs on the Nvidia and SoftBank AI trade.
items.title_zh: 比特币延续跌势，现货 ETF 流出创历史新高，而华尔街则对人工智能大为不满
items.summary_zh: 截至周五的 10 个交易日内，美国现货比特币 ETF 损失 29.7 亿美元，创有记录以来最长的连续流出纪录。尽管全球股市因英伟达和软银人工智能交易而创下新高，但伊朗协议陷入停滞，油价反弹仍增加了压力。

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway makes $6.8 billion housing bet with Taylor Morrison deal
items.summary: The acquisition marks one of the first major strategic deals under Warren Buffett's successor Greg Abel, who took over as CEO in the beginning of 2026.
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司在泰勒·莫里森交易中押注 68 亿美元的住房市场
items.summary_zh: 此次收购是沃伦·巴菲特的继任者格雷格·阿贝尔 (Greg Abel) 领导下的首批重大战略交易之一，格雷格·阿贝尔于 2026 年初接任首席执行官。

items.title: Israel seizes castle in Lebanon as it expands ground offensive
items.summary: Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu calls the capture of the strategic fortress a "decisive shift" in Israel's campaign against Hezbollah, as European governments criticise the escalation.
items.title_zh: 以色列扩大地面攻势夺取黎巴嫩城堡
items.summary_zh: 以色列总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡称，占领战略要塞是以色列打击真主党行动的“决定性转变”，而欧洲各国政府则批评事态升级。

items.title: Warp’s big bet on building open source with GPT-5.5
items.summary: Warp uses GPT-5.5 and OpenAI models to coordinate coding agents across local, cloud, and open-source development workflows.
items.title_zh: Warp 押注于使用 GPT-5.5 构建开源
items.summary_zh: Warp 使用 GPT-5.5 和 OpenAI 模型来协调本地、云和开源开发工作流程中的编码代理。

items.title: Two months, $2.6 billion: How NASA ETF turned SpaceX IPO access into a hot retail trade
items.summary: With Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO ahead, retail investors are rushing into space-themed ETFs including NASA which offers direct access to the rocket company.
items.title_zh: 两个月，26 亿美元：NASA ETF 如何将 SpaceX IPO 变成热门零售交易
items.summary_zh: 随着埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) SpaceX 首次公开募股 (IPO) 的临近，散户投资者纷纷涌入太空主题 ETF，其中包括 NASA，后者提供直接投资这家火箭公司的机会。

items.title: Iran attacks damage 20 US military sites since start of war, satellite images show
items.summary: Analysts told BBC Verify that Tehran's strikes were more extensive than publicly acknowledged.
items.title_zh: 卫星图像显示，自战争开始以来，伊朗袭击损坏了 20 个美国军事基地
items.summary_zh: 分析人士告诉 BBC verify，德黑兰的袭击范围比公开承认的还要广泛。

items.title: Huge blast kills dozens in rebel-held village in Myanmar
items.summary: Insurgents say it was caused by explosives being used for mining close to the Chinese border.
items.title_zh: 缅甸叛军控制的村庄发生巨大爆炸，造成数十人死亡
items.summary_zh: 叛乱分子称，这是由于在中国边境附近采矿时使用爆炸物造成的。

items.title: Syrian Officers Who Hid in Plain Sight Face War Crime Charges in Austria
items.summary: The trial, Austria’s first against Assad regime officials, will be a rare chance for Syrian witnesses to confront two men they have accused of torture.
items.title_zh: 隐藏在众目睽睽之下的叙利亚军官在奥地利面临战争罪指控
items.summary_zh: 这是奥地利首次针对阿萨德政权官员的审判，对于叙利亚证人来说，这将是一次难得的机会，可以与他们指控施行酷刑的两名男子对峙。

items.title: Dozens Killed as Explosion Flattens Rebel-Held Village in Myanmar
items.summary: The local authorities said the cause was an accident at a warehouse that held explosives for mining operations.
items.title_zh: 缅甸叛军控制的村庄发生爆炸，造成数十人死亡
items.summary_zh: 地方当局表示，事故原因是一个存放采矿作业炸药的仓库发生事故。

items.title: Israel Captures Crusader Castle That Symbolized Its Long Lebanon Occupation
items.summary: The seizure of Beaufort in southern Lebanon called up bitter memories in both countries amid a widening Israeli conflict with Hezbollah that seems far from over.
items.title_zh: 以色列占领象征其长期占领黎巴嫩的十字军城堡
items.summary_zh: 以色列与真主党的冲突似乎远未结束，黎巴嫩南部博福特的占领勾起了两国痛苦的回忆。

items.title: Citi predicts the tokenized securities market will grow to $5.5 trillion by 2030
items.summary: Stablecoins alone will generate a demand for up to $1 trillion worth of onchain U.S. Treasury bills and $2.6 trillion for tokenized stocks, said Citi.
items.title_zh: 花旗预测到 2030 年代币化证券市场将增长至 5.5 万亿美元
items.summary_zh: 花旗表示，仅稳定币一项就将产生对价值高达 1 万亿美元的链上美国国债和 2.6 万亿美元的代币化股票的需求。

items.title: Whitehat developer unlocks $2 million stuck in a 2016 Ethereum ICO contract for nine years
items.summary: 0xflorent, a security researcher, found an integer-overflow flaw in the HongCoin token sale contract that lets the team unlock funds for 48 original investors. It is the second such recovery he has publicized in eight days.
items.title_zh: Whitehat 开发商解锁了 2016 年以太坊 ICO 合约九年之久的 200 万美元
items.summary_zh: 安全研究员 0xflorent 在 HongCoin 代币销售合约中发现了一个整数溢出缺陷，该缺陷使团队能够为 48 位原始投资者解锁资金。这是他八天内第二次宣布康复情况。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Solstice (SLX)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #277.
items.title_zh: 热门加密货币：Solstice (SLX)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 277 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #10.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 10。

items.title: Trending Crypto: LAB (LAB)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #24.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：LAB (LAB)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 24 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Portal (PORTAL)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #656.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：门户网站（PORTAL）
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#656。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Stellar (XLM)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #16.
items.title_zh: 热门加密货币：Stellar (XLM)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 16。

items.title: How Endava builds an agentic organization with Codex
items.summary: Learn how Endava uses Codex to build an agentic organization, accelerating software delivery and reducing requirements analysis from weeks to hours.
items.title_zh: Endava 如何利用 Codex 建立代理组织
items.summary_zh: 了解 Endava 如何使用 Codex 构建代理组织、加速软件交付并将需求分析从数周缩短至数小时。

items.title: Cisco and OpenAI redefine enterprise engineering with Codex
items.summary: Cisco and OpenAI are redefining enterprise engineering with Codex, helping Cisco scale AI-native development, accelerate AI Defense work, and automate defect remediation.
items.title_zh: 思科和 OpenAI 通过 Codex 重新定义企业工程
items.summary_zh: 思科和 OpenAI 正在通过 Codex 重新定义企业工程，帮助思科扩展 AI 原生开发、加速 AI 防御工作并自动执行缺陷修复。

items.title: Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook
items.title_zh: 专业化战胜规模：大多数人工智能采购决策忽视的战略变量

items.title: Technology usually creates jobs for young, skilled workers. Will AI do the same?
items.summary: A new study of the postwar U.S. shows which kinds of workers historically filled new tech-enabled jobs.
items.title_zh: 技术通常会为年轻的技术工人创造就业机会。人工智能也会这么做吗？
items.summary_zh: 一项针对战后美国的新研究显示了历史上哪些类型的工人担任了新技术支持的工作。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.
items.title_zh: 人和机器玩的游戏：理清战略推理以推进人工智能
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: Nio shares jump 10% after releasing first flagship EV in more than two years
items.summary: Chinese electric car company Nio has launched two lower-priced brands in the last two years to broaden its customer base in a sluggish Chinese consumer market.
items.title_zh: 两年多来发布首款旗舰电动汽车后，蔚来股价上涨 10%
items.summary_zh: 中国电动汽车公司蔚来在过去两年推出了两个低价品牌，以在低迷的中国消费市场中扩大客户群。

items.title: Three Sui mainnet halts in 48 hours traced to an upgrade bug by developers
items.summary: The Sui Foundation's post-mortem published Sunday traces all three outages to interactions between a new address-balance feature shipped in the v1.72 release and the network's existing gas and consensus logic.
items.title_zh: 48 小时内三起 Sui 主网宕机，归因于开发人员的升级错误
items.summary_zh: Sui 基金会周日发布的事后分析将所有三起中断追溯到 v1.72 版本中提供的新地址平衡功能与网络现有的 Gas 和共识逻辑之间的交互。

items.title: Coinbase makes a major play for India’s booming $3 billion crypto market with local currency launch
items.summary: Coinbase announces INR rails to make the platform fully accessible to Indian retail traders.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 推出本地货币，为印度蓬勃发展的 30 亿美元加密市场发挥重要作用
items.summary_zh: Coinbase 宣布推出印度卢比标准，以使印度零售交易者完全可以使用该平台。

items.title: A massive $1.26 billion sale of BlackRock’s IBIT was likely a rapid exit by a large investor
items.summary: NYDIG, meanwhile, rejected the basis-trade theory, citing the large discount and the lack of an unusual spike in corresponding CME bitcoin futures volume.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德以 12.6 亿美元大规模出售 IBIT 可能是大型投资者的快速退出
items.summary_zh: 与此同时，NYDIG 拒绝了基差贸易理论，理由是折扣很大，而且相应的 CME 比特币期货交易量没有出现异常飙升。

items.title: Coinbase launches Indian rupee rails with perps access in expansion push
items.summary: The Nasdaq-listed company said it has established INR order books to provide dedicated liquidity for users in the country.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 推出印度卢比铁路，并在扩张推动中允许准入
items.summary_zh: 这家纳斯达克上市公司表示，已建立印度卢比订单簿，为该国用户提供专门的流动性。

items.title: Sui traces three mainnet halts to upgrade bugs, including a fix it knew carried halt risk
items.summary: The Sui Foundation said no user funds were at risk and credited AI agents with speeding up its diagnosis of the incidents.
items.title_zh: Sui 追踪了三个主网停止升级错误，其中包括一个已知存在停止风险的修复
items.summary_zh: Sui 基金会表示，没有用户资金面临风险，并称赞人工智能代理加快了对事件的诊断速度。

items.title: Cosmos-based Gravity Bridge drained of $5.4 million in suspected key compromise, researchers say
items.summary: The attacker took USDC, ether, tether and PAYG tokens before laundering a portion through ChangeNow and Binance.
items.title_zh: 研究人员称，基于 Cosmos 的 Gravity Bridge 因涉嫌关键泄露而损失了 540 万美元
items.summary_zh: 攻击者拿走了 USDC、以太币、tether 和 PAYG 代币，然后通过 ChangeNow 和 Binance 洗钱一部分。

items.title: Strengthening societal resilience with Rosalind Biodefense
items.summary: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners advancing biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness through frontier AI.
items.title_zh: 通过 Rosalind Biodefense 增强社会复原力
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 Rosalind Biodefense，为经过审查的开发人员和美国政府合作伙伴扩大对 GPT-Rosalind 的可信访问，通过前沿 AI 推进生物防御、公共卫生和大流行病防范。

items.title: A shared playbook for trustworthy third party evaluations
items.summary: OpenAI shares guidance on third-party AI evaluations, covering how to assess model capabilities, safeguards, and validity for frontier systems.
items.title_zh: 值得信赖的第三方评估的共享手册
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 分享了第三方人工智能评估指南，涵盖如何评估前沿系统的模型能力、保障措施和有效性。

items.title: Welcome NVIDIA Cosmos 3: The First Open Omni-model for Physical AI Reasoning and Action
items.title_zh: 欢迎 NVIDIA Cosmos 3：首个用于物理 AI 推理和行动的开放式全模型

items.title: ITBench-AA: Frontier Models Score Below 50% on the First Benchmark for Agentic Enterprise IT Tasks — by Artificial Analysis and IBM
items.title_zh: ITBench-AA：在代理企业 IT 任务的第一个基准测试中，前沿模型的得分低于 50% — 由人工分析和 IBM 提供

items.title: OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models
items.title_zh: OlmoEarth v1.1：更高效的地球观测模型系列

items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
items.summary: We've been busy! Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们在 I/O 2026 上宣布的 100 件事
items.summary_zh: 我们一直很忙！以下是 I/O 2026 上最重要的公告、发布和演示的摘要。

items.title: How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S.
items.summary: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.
items.title_zh: AI 模式如何改变美国人们的搜索方式
items.summary_zh: 发布一年后，看看 AI 模式的用户如何从关键字转向自然语言查询。

items.title: New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace
items.summary: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Workspace 中创建和完成工作的新方法
items.summary_zh: 宣布 Gmail、Docs 和 Keep 中的新语音功能、名为 Google Pics 的新设计工具以及 AI Inbox 的更新。

items.title: Building AI models that understand chemical principles
items.summary: Connor Coley works at the interface of chemistry and machine learning, to discover and design new drug compounds.
items.title_zh: 构建理解化学原理的人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: Connor Coley 致力于化学和机器学习的结合，发现和设计新的药物化合物。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Nvidia picks Unitree for humanoid robot platform as Chinese startup eyes IPO
items.summary: The U.S. chipmaker's first publicly available humanoid robotics system will use humanoids from Chinese startup Unitree.
items.title_zh: 中国初创公司考虑首次公开募股，英伟达选择 Unitree 作为人形机器人平台
items.summary_zh: 这家美国芯片制造商的第一个公开的人形机器人系统将使用中国初创公司 Unitree 的人形机器人。

items.title: China’s factory activity beats forecasts in May, private survey shows, despite softer official data
items.summary: China’s manufacturing activity expanded faster than expected in May, according to a private survey released Monday, although growth slowed from April.
items.title_zh: 私人调查显示，尽管官方数据疲软，中国 5 月份工厂活动仍超出预期
items.summary_zh: 周一发布的一项私人调查显示，中国 5 月份制造业活动扩张速度快于预期，但增速较 4 月份有所放缓。

items.title: Former Barclays CEO Jes Staley agrees to July 23 interview about Jeffrey Epstein by Oversight panel
items.summary: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates is scheduled to be interviewed about his relationship to the sex offender Jeffrey Epstein in June.
items.title_zh: 巴克莱银行前首席执行官 Jes Staley 同意 7 月 23 日接受监督小组关于杰弗里·爱泼斯坦 (Jeffrey Epstein) 的采访
items.summary_zh: 微软联合创始人比尔盖茨计划于六月接受采访，谈论他与性犯罪者杰弗里爱泼斯坦的关系。

items.title: CFTC sues Rhode Island over actions against prediction markets
items.summary: It marks the seventh state the commission has sued in a dispute over who has the right to regulate event contract platforms.
items.title_zh: 美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 起诉罗德岛州针对预测市场的行为
items.summary_zh: 这是该委员会在谁有权监管赛事合约平台的争议中起诉的第七个州。

items.title: Gaming association says states have lost $1 billion in tax revenue due to prediction markets
items.summary: Bill Miller, American Gaming Association president and CEO, added that prediction market platforms in his view amount to "backdoor sports betting."
items.title_zh: 博彩协会称各州因预测市场损失了 10 亿美元的税收
items.summary_zh: 美国博彩协会主席兼首席执行官比尔·米勒补充说，他认为预测市场平台相当于“后门体育博彩”。

items.title: Google employee charged with $1M Polymarket insider trading bet on search term
items.summary: The complaint from the Southern District of New York comes just over a month after another insider trading case on Polymarket.
items.title_zh: 谷歌员工被控在 Polymarket 搜索词上进行 100 万美元内幕交易
items.summary_zh: 纽约南区的投诉是在 Polymarket 发生另一起内幕交易案件一个多月后发出的。

items.title: US says it struck Iranian radar sites as Kuwait reports missile and drone attacks
items.summary: Iran and the US say they have carried out fresh attacks around the Strait of Hormuz, the third known escalation in a week.
items.title_zh: 美国称袭击了伊朗雷达站，科威特报告导弹和无人机袭击
items.summary_zh: 伊朗和美国表示，他们在霍尔木兹海峡周围发动了新的袭击，这是一周内已知的第三次升级。

items.title: Colombia presidential runoff pits leftist senator against pro-Trump rival
items.summary: Left-wing senator Iván Cepeda will face Trump admirer Abelardo de la Espriella at the final ballot on 21 June.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚总统决选，左翼参议员与支持特朗普的竞争对手
items.summary_zh: 左翼参议员伊万·塞佩达 (Iván Cepeda) 将在 6 月 21 日的最后投票中对阵特朗普的崇拜者阿韦拉多·德拉埃斯普里埃拉 (Abelardo de la Espriella)。

items.title: Poland's controversial 'Highway to Hel' 666 bus revived
items.summary: Poland's seaside resort called Hel is getting its 666 bus service back, despite earlier opposition from Christian groups.
items.title_zh: 波兰备受争议的“通往赫尔的高速公路”666巴士复活
items.summary_zh: 波兰的海滨度假胜地海尔 (Hel) 不顾基督教团体的反对，正在恢复 666 路公交车服务。

items.title: Polls open in Ethiopia, but not everyone can vote
items.summary: Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed's party is expected to dominate the election as conflicts overshadow the vote.
items.title_zh: 埃塞俄比亚开始投票，但并非所有人都可以投票
items.summary_zh: 由于冲突给投票带来了影响，预计总理阿比·艾哈迈德的政党将在选举中占据主导地位。

items.title: South Africa made to look like fools over World Cup visa issues, says minister
items.summary: After a day of uncertainty, the government confirms the team will depart for Mexico on Monday.
items.title_zh: 南非部长表示，南非在世界杯签证问题上看起来像个傻瓜
items.summary_zh: 经过一天的不确定性后，政府确认该团队将于周一启程前往墨西哥。

items.title: Hundreds arrested and dozens of police injured after Champions League riots in France
items.summary: Nearly 800 people were arrested after clashes with police which saw 219 people injured, including 57 police officers.
items.title_zh: 法国欧冠骚乱数百人被捕，数十名警察受伤
items.summary_zh: 与警察发生冲突，造成近 800 人被捕，造成 219 人受伤，其中包括 57 名警察。

items.title: Dead whale towed ashore in Denmark ahead of autopsy
items.summary: "Timmy" was found dead off the coast of Anholt despite multiple attempts to rescue it.
items.title_zh: 死亡鲸鱼在尸检前被拖上丹麦岸
items.summary_zh: 尽管多次尝试营救，“蒂米”还是在安霍尔特海岸被发现死亡。

items.title: Brooklyn Rivera, Nicaraguan Indigenous Leader, Dies in Government Custody
items.summary: Brooklyn Rivera, 73, one of the most prominent Miskito political leaders in recent history, was arrested by the government in 2023. His family and other groups dispute the circumstances surrounding his death.
items.title_zh: 尼加拉瓜原住民领袖布鲁克林·里维拉在政府拘留中去世
items.summary_zh: 73 岁的布鲁克林·里维拉 (Brooklyn Rivera) 是近代历史上最著名的米斯基托政治领导人之一，于 2023 年被政府逮捕。他的家人和其他团体对他的死亡原因存在争议。

items.title: Taiwan Criticizes China’s Expulsion of New York Times Reporter
items.summary: The Taiwan president’s spokeswoman said China used “baseless pretexts” to punish journalists, which she called evidence that Beijing was a “troublemaker.”
items.title_zh: 台湾批评中国驱逐《纽约时报》记者
items.summary_zh: 台湾总统发言人表示，中国使用“毫无根据的借口”惩罚记者，她称这证明北京是“麻烦制造者”。

items.title: Even Havana’s Street Sweepers Can’t Escape the Impact of the Fuel Blockade
items.summary: A fuel blockade on Cuba has aggravated a lack of consistent garbage pickup and produced enormous trash piles.
items.title_zh: 哈瓦那的街道清扫工也无法逃脱燃料封锁的影响
items.summary_zh: 对古巴的燃料封锁加剧了垃圾收集缺乏持续性的问题，并产生了巨大的垃圾堆。

items.title: Colombia Presidential Election Heads to a Runoff
items.summary: The candidate, Abelardo de la Espriella, will face a senator from the left-wing party of the outgoing president, Gustavo Petro, in a June runoff.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚总统选举进入决选
items.summary_zh: 候选人阿韦拉多·德拉埃斯普里埃拉 (Abelardo de la Espriella) 将在 6 月的决选中面对来自即将卸任总统古斯塔沃·佩特罗 (Gustavo Petro) 的左翼政党的参议员。

items.title: To Improve Ukraine’s Military, She Calls Out the Ugly Parts
items.summary: Olha Reshetylova has been tasked by the government with overseeing soldiers’ rights. Some commanders resent her, but she says her work makes the armed forces stronger.
items.title_zh: 为了改善乌克兰的军事力量，她指出了丑陋的部分
items.summary_zh: 奥尔哈·雷舍特洛娃 (Olha Reshetylova) 受政府委托，负责监督士兵的权利。一些指挥官对她不满，但她说她的工作使武装部队变得更加强大。

items.title: As Deaths From U.S. Boat Strikes Pass 200, Locals Tally an Even Greater Cost
items.summary: Residents of coastal communities in Colombia and Ecuador said the airstrike campaign was making many reconsider anything involving the ocean as a livelihood.
items.title_zh: 美国船只撞击造成的死亡人数已超过 200 人，当地人付出的代价更大
items.summary_zh: 哥伦比亚和厄瓜多尔沿海社区的居民表示，空袭行动让许多人重新考虑以海洋为生的任何事情。

items.title: In Taiwan, ‘Mainland Spouses’ From China Become a Focus of Infiltration Fears
items.summary: At the heart of a criminal case involving one such wife is a question: How can Taiwan protect its democracy without unfairly targeting Chinese migrants?
items.title_zh: 在台湾，来自中国的“大陆配偶”成为渗透恐惧的焦点
items.summary_zh: 涉及一位这样的妻子的刑事案件的核心是一个问题：台湾如何在不不公平地针对中国移民的情况下保护其民主？

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 05/17/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Sunday, 05/17/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Agentic Workflows for Alpha Research [Jonathan Kinlay] There is by now a small mountain of vendor material claiming that AI
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 5 月 17 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 5 月 17 日星期日 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！ Alpha Research 的代理工作流程 [Jonathan Kinlay] 目前有一小堆供应商材料声称 AI

items.title: XRP drops to $1.32 as sellers overpower exchange outflows
items.summary: XRP hit a 15-week low before stabilizing, with traders watching whether the latest washout turns into a base or another leg lower.
items.title_zh: 由于卖家压倒了交易所流出，XRP 跌至 1.32 美元
items.summary_zh: XRP 在企稳之前触及 15 周低点，交易者关注最新的下跌是否会形成底部或再次走低。

items.title: Aave overhauls listing standards after $230 Million rsETH exploit exposed bridge risks
items.summary: An official postmortem traced the exploit to a LayerZero bridge verification failure and outlined a sweeping overhaul of Aave's asset-listing standards as DeFi risks shift beyond smart contract bugs.
items.title_zh: 在 2.3 亿美元的 rsETH 利用暴露的过桥风险后，Aave 彻底修改了上市标准
items.summary_zh: 官方事后分析将这一漏洞追溯到 LayerZero 桥接验证失败，并概述了随着 DeFi 风险转移到智能合约错误之外，对 Aave 资产列出标准进行彻底改革。

items.title: How the House Financial Services Committee is taking on tokenization: State of Crypto
items.summary: Rep. French Hill, head of the House Financial Services Committee, weighed in on outstanding policy issues in an interview with CoinDesk last month.
items.title_zh: 众议院金融服务委员会如何对待代币化：加密货币现状
items.summary_zh: 众议院金融服务委员会主席、众议员弗伦奇·希尔 (French Hill) 上个月在接受 CoinDesk 采访时就悬而未决的政策问题发表了看法。

items.title: How Stellar became part of DTCC's tokenization push for Wall Street securities onchain
items.summary: Wall Street's clearing giant chose a public blockchain with compliance tools built for regulated assets, Stellar Development Foundation CEO Denelle Dixon said.
items.title_zh: Stellar 如何成为 DTCC 推动华尔街证券链上代币化的一部分
items.summary_zh: 恒星发展基金会首席执行官 Denelle Dixon 表示，华尔街清算巨头选择了带有为受监管资产构建的合规工具的公共区块链。

items.title: The Funding: How crypto hedge funds are navigating weak markets
items.summary: As crypto markets remain weak, fund managers say asset selection, fundamentals, and alpha matter more than ever.
items.title_zh: 资金：加密货币对冲基金如何应对疲软的市场
items.summary_zh: 由于加密货币市场依然疲软，基金经理表示，资产选择、基本面和阿尔法比以往任何时候都更加重要。

items.title: Dev helps rescue $2 million locked in 2016 ICO contract for nine years with whitehat exploit
items.summary: The developer told The Block that two of 48 eligible investors have already claimed 96.5 ETH that was unfrozen, worth nearly $200,000 at current prices.
items.title_zh: Dev 通过白帽漏洞帮助解救 2016 年 ICO 合约锁定九年的 200 万美元
items.summary_zh: 开发商告诉 The Block，48 名合格投资者中的两名已经领取了 96.5 枚未冻结的 ETH，按当前价格计算，价值近 20 万美元。

items.title: Cardano Foundation cancels 2026 summit after treasury funding vote falls just short
items.summary: The measure needed two-thirds support but got only 65%, even after late endorsements from Cardano's founder and the Foundation CEO.
items.title_zh: 卡尔达诺基金会因财政拨款投票未通过而取消 2026 年峰会
items.summary_zh: 该措施需要三分之二的支持，但即使在卡尔达诺创始人和基金会首席执行官的后期支持之后，也只获得了 65% 的支持。

items.title: SEC sues Privvy founder over $12.3 million crypto scheme as AI ‘bots’ turn out to be neither
items.summary: The SEC alleges Fuller spent misappropriated funds on a roughly $1 million house, gambling, trading cards, travel and a Jeep.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会 (SEC) 起诉 Privvy 创始人 1230 万美元的加密货币计划，因为人工智能“机器人”两者都不是
items.summary_zh: SEC 指控 Fuller 将挪用资金用于购买价值约 100 万美元的房屋、赌博、交易卡、旅行和一辆吉普车。

items.title: Crypto champion Trump may be jeopardizing the industry’s landmark legislation
items.summary: Digital asset legislation is years in the making, but the sector's biggest political champion, President Trump, has become a liability.
items.title_zh: 加密货币冠军特朗普可能会危及该行业具有里程碑意义的立法
items.summary_zh: 数字资产立法已经酝酿多年，但该行业最大的政治支持者特朗普总统已成为一种负担。

items.title: Court-ordered Circle freeze traps $12.6 million in Zama cUSDC contract amid Overnight Finance suit
items.summary: Zama CEO Rand Hindi said the protocol's confidential USDC contract was "caught in a crossfire" and that his team is investigating the freeze.
items.title_zh: 在隔夜融资诉讼中，法院下令 Circle 冻结 Zama cUSDC 合约中 1260 万美元的资金
items.summary_zh: Zama 首席执行官 Rand Hindi 表示，该协议的机密 USDC 合约“陷入了交火”，他的团队正在调查冻结情况。

items.title: US has seized nearly $1 billion in crypto from Iran, Bessent says
items.summary: Earlier this year, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. had seized "nearly $500 million" in Iranian crypto assets.
items.title_zh: Bessent 表示，美国从伊朗查获了近 10 亿美元的加密货币
items.summary_zh: 今年早些时候，财政部长斯科特·贝森特表示，美国扣押了“近 5 亿美元”的伊朗加密资产。

items.summary: Watch 9 videos showing the capabilities of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5, announced at Google I/O 2026.

items.summary_zh: 回顾 2026 年 I/O 对话，领导人讨论人工智能、量子计算、机器人和创造力的未来。

items.title: We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.

items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam

items.title: Media Advisory: MIT to establish regional quantum hub
items.summary: With $25 million investment from the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, MIT to build a new shared-use facility to serve as a statewide quantum toolbox.
items.title_zh: 媒体咨询：麻省理工学院将建立区域量子中心

items.title: Justin Solomon appointed associate dean of engineering education
items.summary: MIT faculty member in electrical engineering and computer science to focus on innovation in engineering education and new pedagogical approaches.

items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院电气工程和计算机科学教员，专注于工程教育和新教学方法的创新。

items.title: Two from MIT named 2026 Knight-Hennessy Scholars

items.summary_zh: 这项享有盛誉的奖学金资助斯坦福大学的研究生学习。

items.title: Q&A: Expanding MIT’s global reach through Universal Learning
items.summary: Dimitris Bertsimas and Megan Mitchell discuss the motivation behind Universal Learning, and what sets the new MIT Open Learning educational initiative apart.
items.title_zh: 问答：通过通用学习扩大麻省理工学院的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: Dimitris Bertsimas 和 Megan Mitchell 讨论了通用学习背后的动机，以及麻省理工学院新的开放学习教育计划的与众不同之处。

items.title: Universal AI is “a pathway to AI fluency that’s accessible and approachable to anyone, anywhere”
items.summary: New AI education program from MIT Open Learning debuts with AI-powered personalization and a free introductory course for learners everywhere.

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。
